ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the digital camera */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the digital camera */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the camera model */,
  "max_resolution" TEXT /* Maximum resolution of the camera */,
  "low_resolution" TEXT /* Low resolution of the camera */,
  "effective_pixels" TEXT /* Effective pixels of the camera sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used in the camera */,
  "iso_range" TEXT /* ISO range of the camera */,
  "video_resolution" TEXT /* Maximum video resolution supported */,
  "zoom_wide" TEXT /* Zoom wide angle capability */,
  "zoom_tele" TEXT /* Zoom telephoto capability */,
  "normal_focus_range" TEXT /* Normal focus range */,
  "macro_focus_range" TEXT /* Macro focus range */,
  "storage_included" TEXT /* Storage included with the camera */,
  "battery_life" TEXT /* Battery life of the camera */,
  "connectivity_options" TEXT /* Available connectivity options */,
  "color_options" TEXT /* Available color options */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the camera */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the camera including batteries */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the camera */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the camera model in stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory item (in stock, out of stock, backorder) */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Estimated date for restocking if out of stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the camera is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is listed */,
  "regular_price" TEXT /* Regular price of the camera */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the camera during promotions */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of discount during promotions */,
  "promotion_start" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the camera ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the camera was sold */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if a discount was applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpfulness_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the helpfulness of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Model name of the digital camera
Release date of the camera model
Effective pixels of the camera sensor
Type of sensor used in the camera
Weight of the camera including batteries
Unique identifier for each inventory record
